footer.tagline: Computer science education, made simple and hands-on.

hero.subheadline: CodeStar is a hands-on computer-science platform. From your first variable to distributed systems — learn at your own pace, track your progress, and ship real projects.

featured.title: Featured Courses
featured.subtitle: Structured paths to go from complete beginner to confident engineer.

pythonFundamentals.title: Python Fundamentals
pythonFundamentals.description: Master Python from scratch. Learn variables, control flow, functions, and object-oriented programming through hands-on exercises.

algorithmsDataStructures.title: Algorithms & Data Structures
algorithmsDataStructures.description: Deep-dive into sorting, searching, graphs, and dynamic programming. Solve real interview problems step by step.

webDevelopmentBasics.title: Web Development Basics
webDevelopmentBasics.description: Build your first web pages with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Progress to React and learn how modern UIs are built.

introductionToDatabases.title: Introduction to Databases
introductionToDatabases.description: Understand relational databases, write SQL queries, and explore NoSQL alternatives. Learn schema design and optimization.

networkingFundamentals.title: Networking Fundamentals
networkingFundamentals.description: From HTTP to TCP/IP — understand how data travels across the internet and how to build robust networked applications.

systemDesign.title: System Design
systemDesign.description: Learn to design large-scale distributed systems. Cover load balancing, caching, databases, and microservices architecture.
